prompt:
Goal: Create a dramatic vertical manga page about a supernatural apocalypse in modern Sapporo, where a purple rift opens in the sky, a giant demon descends, and a schoolgirl hero with robotic allies prepares to fight.

Canvas: Tall comic page in a 3:4 vertical ratio, full-bleed artwork with thin white gutters and black panel borders. Use a polished high-detail anime/manga style with cinematic lighting, saturated neon colors, dense city detail, and intense action composition.

Layout: Use exactly 3 horizontal panels stacked vertically. Panel 1 occupies the top third, Panel 2 the middle third, and Panel 3 the bottom third. Add exactly 4 white jagged manga speech balloons with vertical Japanese text.

Panel 1: Nighttime downtown Sapporo cityscape seen from street level, crowded with shocked pedestrians looking upward. The Sapporo TV Tower stands on the left, glowing orange with signage reading “30-24 SAPPORO.” Above the skyline, the sky has split into a massive swirling purple vortex filled with lightning, stars, debris, and a single red reptilian eye at the center. Include exactly 2 speech balloons: one small jagged balloon on the left reading なんだあれ!?, and one tall jagged balloon on the right reading 空が割れてる!!.

Panel 2: The vortex ruptures over a neon Japanese city intersection. A colossal demonic kaiju emerges from the purple storm, filling most of the frame. It has a muscular black-and-purple body, glowing red eyes, huge curved horns, ornate organic armor, clawed hands reaching toward the street, and a circular glowing sigil embedded in its chest. Cars crash and flip in the foreground, sparks and explosions scatter across the road, people run in panic, and buildings with neon signs frame both sides. Include exactly 1 tall jagged speech balloon on the right reading 人間界ヲ焼キ払エ・・・!.

Panel 3: Hero reveal composition under a cherry-blossom-like shower of pink petals and purple cosmic light. Center foreground: a Japanese high school girl hero, unnamed schoolgirl, standing confidently with long black hair blowing in the wind; her face is softly obscured or not sharply detailed. She wears a navy school blazer, white shirt, red ribbon tie, plaid skirt, and holds a glowing pink energy katana angled downward across the foreground. Around her are exactly 3 mechanical allies: 1 white robotic wolf with blue glowing eyes and blue cybernetic armor at lower left, 1 bulky gorilla-like armored robot with blue eyes and a huge red glowing cannon fist at lower right, and 1 silver-blue winged mecha bird hovering behind her on the upper right. The Sapporo tower is visible again in the background. Include exactly 1 white oval speech balloon on the left reading また始まったか・・・.

Visual style: Hyper-detailed Japanese action manga/anime illustration, glossy digital painting, dramatic perspective, neon purple apocalypse lighting, electric effects, particles, debris, high contrast, intricate linework, cinematic depth, crisp panel art.

Constraints: Keep exactly 3 panels, exactly 4 speech balloons, exactly 3 robotic allies, and no extra captions or narration boxes. Preserve the Japanese text exactly as written inside the balloons. Do not add watermarks, artist signatures, UI elements, or English subtitles.
